name: Rush Street Interactive, Inc.
business: Rush Street Interactive is a leading online gaming and entertainment company that provides real-money online casino, online sports betting, retail sports betting, and social gaming to customers in the U.S., Canada, and Latin America. It operates under the BetRivers, PlaySugarHouse, and RushBet brands, and generates revenue primarily through business-to-consumer (B2C) operations.
sellsTo: End consumers in 16 U.S. states and four international markets (Colombia, Ontario Canada, Mexico, Peru)
Land-based casinos and partners via business-to-business (B2B) retail sports betting services
namedSuppliers: Kambi Group plc and its subsidiaries (risk and trading platform for online sports betting)

exposures.sentence: We are a leading online gaming and entertainment company that focuses primarily on online casino and online sports betting in the U.S., Canadian and Latin American markets.

tamClaims.claim: If every U.S. state was to legalize online casino, based on state level projections from EKG, it is projected that the U.S. market would generate approximately $97 billion in revenue.
tamClaims.sentence: If every U.S. state was to legalize online casino, based on state level projections from EKG, it is projected that the U.S. market would generate approximately $97 billion in revenue.

tamClaims.claim: Similarly, if every U.S. state was to legalize online sports betting, based on state level projections from EKG, it is projected that the U.S. market would generate approximately $34 billion in revenue.
tamClaims.sentence: Similarly, if every U.S. state was to legalize online sports betting, based on state level projections from EKG, it is projected that the U.S. market would generate approximately $34 billion in revenue.

tamClaims.claim: Online casino revenue in the U.S. grew by 27% from $8.4 billion to $10.7 billion from 2024 to 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Per EKG, online casino revenue in the U.S. grew by 27% from $8.4 billion to $10.7 billion from 2024 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: EKG expects continued growth in the U.S. online casino market as more states regulate and markets mature, with projected revenue to approach $13.6 billion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: EKG expects continued growth in the U.S. online casino market as more states regulate and markets mature, with projected revenue to approach $13.6 billion by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: EKG projects continued growth as more states regulate and markets mature, with forecasts for online sports betting revenue to exceed $21.0 billion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: EKG projects continued growth as more states regulate and markets mature, with forecasts for online sports betting revenue to exceed $21.0 billion by 2029.

tamClaims.claim: Based on data from EKG, online sports and casino revenue grew at a 74% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2019 to 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Based on data from EKG, online sports and casino revenue grew at a 74% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2019 to 2025.
